sys_cb_design_topic.design_definition: {"type":"FlowTopic","triggers":[{"type":"Trigger","name":"fda8214b00b04ea2b2f70cfc89e0f883","triggerType":"request","applicability":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"true"},"id":"fda8214b00b04ea2b2f70cfc89e0f883"}],"goals":[{"name":"primary","trigger_id":"fda8214b00b04ea2b2f70cfc89e0f883","nodes":[{"type":"StartGoal","goal_id":"primary","greeting_msg":{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":"gs.getMessageLang(\"va:topic:c66d503787876a5002fdeac73cbb3574:node:01e187c8fecc4e69b12b74223341cef7:field:GreetingMsg\", vaContext.getRequesterLang())"},"id":"01e187c8fecc4e69b12b74223341cef7","name":"Start","expert_mode":false},{"type":"TerminateGoal","goal_id":"primary","confirmation_msg":{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":""},"id":"339ff2bbaf26411c99125e25bbb698cd","name":"End","expert_mode":false},{"type":"InputPrompt","variable_id":"fed1ead3a7194235b4565e7c96d3ea54","message":{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":"gs.getMessageLang(\"Please enter the customer ID\", vaContext.getRequesterLang())"},"default_value":{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":""},"nlu_entity_binding":{"type":"NLUEntityBinding","allow_text_input":false,"use_confirmation_prompt":true},"request_feedback":true,"skippable":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"false"},"skipreprompt":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"false"},"id":"98a55eb3ca4f416c914596ea99ed709a","name":"Customer Input","goal_id":"primary","applicability":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"true"},"expert_mode":false,"formatType":"Text","validationScript":"","description":""},{"type":"TextOutputPrompt","value":[{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":"gs.getMessageLang(\"Here are the details for {0}:\", vaContext.getRequesterLang(), [vaInputs.customer_input])"}],"request_feedback":true,"id":"4c6a094bd9ec4a07b7757089778172d1","name":"Bot Response","goal_id":"primary","applicability":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"true"},"expert_mode":false,"secure":false},{"type":"RecordOutputPrompt","mode":"query","table":"x_cpszo_spoke_offer_tracker","fields":["number","offer_type","installment_amount","delinquency_status"],"request_feedback":true,"id":"47fe11228a02430ba012ec60aa17188c","name":"Display Cards","goal_id":"primary","applicability":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"true"},"expert_mode":false,"reference_qualifier_condition":"number={{vaInputs.customer_input}}^ORnumberLIKE{{vaInputs.customer_input}}","condition":{"type":"Condition","mode":"glide_query","value":"number={{vaInputs.customer_input}}^ORnumberLIKE{{vaInputs.customer_input}}"}},{"type":"ChoiceInputPrompt","expression_mode":"simple","metadataScript":"","cardName":"","cardFields":[],"id":"1c9e34b578dc4806991e6a7319914041","name":"Offer Choice1","goal_id":"primary","applicability":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"true"},"expert_mode":false,"variable_id":"e3de050d6e104a89b6dd867367989d76","message":{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":"gs.getMessageLang(\"Click on the offer card above for accepting the offer.\", vaContext.getRequesterLang())"},"request_feedback":false,"skippable":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"false"},"skipreprompt":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"false"},"nlu_entity_binding":{"type":"NLUEntityBinding","allow_text_input":false,"use_confirmation_prompt":true},"description":""},{"type":"RecordOutputPrompt","mode":"query","table":"x_cpszo_spoke_offer_tracker","fields":["number","acceptance_date","offer_status"],"request_feedback":true,"id":"35645cf0590a45cdb10d7eb8dca657f5","name":"Offer Status","goal_id":"primary","applicability":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"true"},"expert_mode":false,"reference_qualifier_condition":"number={{vaInputs.customer_input}}^ORnumberLIKE{{vaInputs.customer_input}}","condition":{"type":"Condition","mode":"glide_query","value":"number={{vaInputs.customer_input}}^ORnumberLIKE{{vaInputs.customer_input}}"}},{"type":"Decision","name":"Decision","branches":[{"type":"Branch","label":"Accepted","expression":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"query","value":"offer_choice1=Accepted"},"id":"44705b1daf9c43d9ab3d25e805e7cd43","name":"Accepted","expert_mode":false},{"type":"Branch","label":"Rejected","expression":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"query","value":"offer_choice1=Rejected"},"id":"cdd425823b9844769097c32f1588c929","name":"Rejected","expert_mode":false}],"id":"31f5acedb1304552a0ec761900d2936a","goal_id":"primary","expert_mode":false},{"type":"CRUDAction","mode":"update","query":"offer_status=Accepted","variable_id":"3330d721e7714b52890c4414692cd29a","id":"19f402e6bbfa4426a8ffc11363b91637","name":"Update Offer Status","goal_id":"primary","applicability":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"true"},"expert_mode":false,"attachments":[{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":""}]},{"type":"CRUDAction","mode":"update","query":"offer_status=Rejected","variable_id":"3330d721e7714b52890c4414692cd29a","id":"7520927fe4fd4024825be5a8166cfc29","name":"Reject payment"],"nlu_provider":"","nlu_model":"","nlu_model_label":"","nlu_intent":"","nlu_intent_label":"","flexible_conversation_switching":false,"autopilot_topic":false,"design_categories":[],"triggerable_by_notification":false,"description":"Helps
